properties.description: It migrates the Oracle HR schema tables to an Azure SQL database with incremental runs.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
  'SELECT FILE_TABLE_ID, ',
  'RIGHT(SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, 7) AS SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'RIGHT(TGT_SCHEMA_NAME, 9) AS TGT_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'SRC_NAME AS SRC_TBL_NAME, ',
  'TGT_NAME AS TGT_TBL_NAME ',
  'FROM FILE_TABLE_MAPPING ',
  'WHERE PIPLN_NM = ''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''' ',
  'AND ROW_STS_CD = ''A'''
)
@variables('SqlQuery')

@concat(
  'SELECT FILE_TABLE_ID, ',
  'RIGHT(SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, 8) AS SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'RIGHT(TGT_SCHEMA_NAME, 5) AS TGT_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'SRC_NAME AS SRC_FILE_NAME, ',
  'TGT_NAME AS TGT_TBL_NAME ',
  'FROM FILE_TABLE_MAPPING ',
  'WHERE PIPLN_NM = ''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''' ',
  'AND ROW_STS_CD = ''A'''
)

value.value: @concat('File ', item().SRC_FILE_NAME, ' doesn''t exist in the landing')
@concat('File ', item().SRC_FILE_NAME, ' doesn''t exist in the landing')

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
  'SELECT SSDTM_ID, ',
  'SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'SRC_TBL_NAME, ',
  'STG_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'STG_TBL_NAME, ',
  'DIM_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'DIM_TBL_NAME ',
  'FROM DBO.SRC_STG_DIM_TABLE_MAPPING ',
  'WHERE PIPLN_NM = ''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''' ',
  'AND ROW_STS_CD = ''A'' ',
  'AND SRC_TBL_NAME = ''BLOB_CUSTOMER_RAW'''
)
@variables('SqlQuery')

@concat(
  'SELECT SSDTM_ID, ',
  'SRC_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'SRC_TBL_NAME, ',
  'STG_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'STG_TBL_NAME, ',
  'DIM_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
  'DIM_TBL_NAME ',
  'FROM DBO.SRC_STG_DIM_TABLE_MAPPING ',
  'WHERE PIPLN_NM = ''', pipeline().Pipeline, ''' ',
  'AND ROW_STS_CD = ''A'' ',
  'AND SRC_TBL_NAME = ''BLOB_CUSTOMER_RAW'''
)
@variables('SqlQuery')

value.value:
@concat(
  'SELECT ',
  'INDEX_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, COMPANY, CITY, COUNTRY, ',
  'PHONE_1, PHONE_2, EMAIL, SUBSCRIPTION_DATE, WEBSITE, ',
  'SRC_ROW_INSRT_TSTMP, ',
  'HASHBYTES(''SHA2_256'', ',
    'CONCAT_WS(''|'', ',
      'ISNULL(FIRST_NAME, ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(LAST_NAME, ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(COMPANY, ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(CITY, ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(COUNTRY, ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(PHONE_1, ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(PHONE_2, ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(EMAIL, ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(30), SUBSCRIPTION_DATE,126), ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(WEBSITE, '''')',
    ')',
  ') AS HASH_DIFF ',
  'FROM ', pipeline().parameters.p_src_schema, '.', pipeline().parameters.p_src_table, ' ',
  'WHERE SRC_ROW_INSRT_TSTMP > CAST(''', 
    formatDateTime(variables('PreviousWatermark'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
  ''' AS DATETIME2)'
)

@concat(
  'SELECT ',
  'INDEX_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, COMPANY, CITY, COUNTRY, ',
  'PHONE_1, PHONE_2, EMAIL, SUBSCRIPTION_DATE, WEBSITE, ',
  'SRC_ROW_INSRT_TSTMP, ',
  'HASHBYTES(''SHA2_256'', ',
  'CONCAT_WS(''|'', ',
    'ISNULL(FIRST_NAME,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(LAST_NAME,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(COMPANY,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(CITY,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(COUNTRY,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(PHONE_1,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(PHONE_2,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(EMAIL,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(CONVERT(NVARCHAR(30), SUBSCRIPTION_DATE,126),'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(WEBSITE,'''') ',
  ')) AS HASH_DIFF ',
  'FROM ', pipeline().parameters.p_src_schema, '.', pipeline().parameters.p_src_table
)

sqlReaderQuery.value:
@concat(
 'SELECT ',
 '''DWH'' AS DIM_TAB_SCHEMA_NAME, ',
 '''DIM_CUSTOMER_DETAILS'' AS DIM_TABLE_NAME, ',
 '''CUSTOMER_ID'' AS BUSSINESS_ID_COL_NM, ',
 'INDEX_NUM, ',
 'CUSTOMER_ID AS BUSSINESS_ID ',
 'FROM ',
 pipeline().parameters.p_src_schema, '.', pipeline().parameters.p_src_table
)
@variables('SqlQuery')

@variables('SqlQuery')

value.value:
@concat(
  'SELECT ',
  'INDEX_NUM,USR_ID,FIRST_NAME,LAST_NAME,SEX,EMAIL,PHONE,DATE_OF_BIRTH, ',
  'JOB_TITLE,SRC_ROW_INSRT_TSTMP ',
  'HASHBYTES(''SHA2_256'', ',
    'CONCAT_WS(''|'', ',
    'ISNULL(FIRST_NAME,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(LAST_NAME,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(SEX,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(DATE_OF_BIRTH,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(JOB_TITLE,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(PHONE,'''') , ',
    'ISNULL(EMAIL,'''') , ',
  ')) AS HASH_DIFF ',
  'FROM ', pipeline().parameters.p_src_schema_name, '.', pipeline().parameters.p_src_table_name, ' ',
  'WHERE SRC_ROW_INSRT_TSTMP > CAST(''', 
    formatDateTime(variables('PreviousWatermark'), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
  ''' AS DATETIME2)'
)

@concat(
  'SELECT ',
  'INDEX_NUM,USR_ID,FIRST_NAME,LAST_NAME,SEX,EMAIL,PHONE,DATE_OF_BIRTH,',
  'JOB_TITLE, SRC_ROW_INSRT_TSTMP, ',
  'CONVERT(VARBINARY(32), HASHBYTES(''SHA2_256'', ',
    'CONCAT_WS(''|'', ',
      'ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(FIRST_NAME)), ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(LAST_NAME)), ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(SEX)), ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(CONVERT(nvarchar(30), DATE_OF_BIRTH, 126), ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(JOB_TITLE)), ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(PHONE)), ''''), ',
      'ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(EMAIL)), '''')',
    ')',                 
  ')) AS HASH_DIFF ',   
  'FROM [', pipeline().parameters.p_src_schema_name, '].[', pipeline().parameters.p_src_table_name, ']'
)

sqlReaderQuery.value: @variables('SqlQuery')

@concat( 'SELECT ', '''DWH'' AS DIM_TAB_SCHEMA_NAME, ', '''DIM_PEOPLE_DETAILS'' AS DIM_TABLE_NAME, ', '''USR_ID'' AS BUSSINESS_ID_COL_NM, ', 'INDEX_NUM, ', 'USR_ID AS BUSSINESS_ID ', 'FROM ', pipeline().parameters.p_src_schema_name, '.', pipeline().parameters.p_src_table_name)
